error_signature: WooCommerce webhook calls stuck in the Cron system
title: WooCommerce webhook not triggering due to Cron issues
symptom: The WooCommerce order.created webhook is created but does not trigger in n8n. No error message is displayed.
applies_when: Webhook is created on the WordPress side
not_this_if: Webhook triggers successfully in other workflows
root_cause: The WordPress Cron system may be malfunctioning, causing the WooCommerce webhook calls to not be sent properly. This can lead to delays or failures in triggering the webhook in n8n.
fix_steps: Disable the sending of WooCommerce webhook calls to Cron in WordPress settings
Test the webhook to see if it triggers correctly in n8n
agent_instruction: Disable WooCommerce webhook calls to Cron and test the trigger again.
safety_notes: Disabling Cron may affect performance and scheduled tasks in WordPress.
